proposal.working_title: Anthropic Mythos Incident: The AI Cybersecurity Wake-Up Call for Enterprise Leaders
proposal.one_line_angle: Most enterprise AI policies were written before agent autonomy, and the Anthropic Mythos disclosure shows why operations leaders need a new playbook before the next agent-driven cybersecurity incident reaches their organization.
outline_bullets: What the Anthropic Mythos disclosure actually revealed about autonomous agent abuse and what enterprise leaders missed
Three categories of agent-driven cybersecurity risk that most enterprise AI governance policies still ignore
How forward-leaning operators are rebuilding incident response and access controls for the agent-driven attack era
